name: Pizzeria Mozza / Mozza2Go
teaser: Legacy status now, but Nancy Silverton is responsible for the LA pizza renaissance. Still top-shelf ingredients.
review:
Mozza has transitioned into legacy pizzeria status, but don't forget that Nancy Silverton is responsible for the LA pizza renaissance thanks to her French bread-inspired crust. Yes, it's expensive, but they are still using top-shelf ingredients.

Pies that were once 10" seem to have grown to 12" (at least at Mozza2Go) while prices stayed flat. Witnessing something like that in the pizza world is like seeing Bigfoot.
headsUp: Mozza2Go has the same pies with less reservation hassle.
update: Prices have held steady. Pies seem slightly larger now.
address: 641 Highland Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90036, USA
hours: Monday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 5:00 – 9:00 PM · Friday: 5:00 – 10:00 PM · Saturday: 12:00 – 10:00 PM · Sunday: 12:00 – 9:00 PM
